  -d, --directory    Root directory to search for projects. Can't be used at the
                     same time as -r|--repo

  -f, --file         File to create CSV file

  -t, --total        (Default: false) Include totals in results. Ignored when
                     used with -i|--inventory

  -i, --inventory    (Default: false) Show inventory of results, instead of an
                     aggregate

  -o, --owner        GitHub owner to search for projects. Can't be used at the
                     same time as -d|--directory. Note that this -r argument was
                     formed used by --raw - which is now achieved with
                     -i|--inventory

  -r, --repo         GitHub repo to search for projects. Can't be used at the
                     same time as -d|--directory. Note that this -r argument was
                     formed used by --raw - which is now achieved with
                     -i|--inventory

  -u, --user         GitHub repo user

  -p, --password     GitHub repo password

  -b, --branch       (Default: main) GitHub repo branch to search

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
